scene.message: Mark: Getting all goggle-eyed{nl} over her, honestly...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: They say fools and{nl} smoke both favor high places.{waitkey}To the top floor we go!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Those SEBEC suits{wait_fr:30}{nl} are sooo lame.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: We've no time to be{nl} playing with the receptionist!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: No time to loaf about.{waitkey}Let's go.{waitkey}{ret}
